chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 760 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.3420/2025 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 28-10-2025 None present for the Petitioners nor any intimation is received. On 27-05-2025, Counsel for the Petitioners was directed to satisfy the Court about maintainability of this Petition and he sought time, as such time was granted. Once again on 14-10-2025 Counsel sought time to address the question of maintainability, the matter was adjourned for today. However, today none has appeared on behalf of the Petitioners. Perusal of the prayer clause reflects that through this Petition, the petitioners are seeking declaration against the act of respondents, who are not allowing the Petitioners to join their services, whereas the documents annexed with the Petition reflect that no Appointment Orders were issued to the Petitioners and only on the basis of offer letters the petitioners are seeking their joining. In view of the above, this Petition being misconceived is hereby dismissed in limine along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
